title: Save $148 on an AMD Ryzen 7 9800X3D bundle with 32GB of RAM, motherboard, and liquid AIO start your AM5 gaming build for just $1,039
summary: Build an AM5 gaming PC with AMD Ryzen 7 9800X3D and 32GB RAM for $1,039. This bundle includes a Gigabyte B850 motherboard and a CPU cooler. Start your gaming PC build with this affordable and powerful configuration.
insight: Affordable AM5 gaming build option with high-performance CPU and RAM.

title: Logitech's G Pro X2 Superstrike gaming mouse is $125.99 after getting a massive $54 discount hall-effect haptic switches, 8K polling, and 30 ms faster clicks for peak gaming performance
summary: Logitech's G Pro X2 Superstrike gaming mouse gets a $54 discount, now $125.99. This deal offers hall-effect haptic switches, 8K polling, and faster clicks for peak gaming performance.
insight: Gamers can now access high-tech gaming peripherals at a lower price.

title: AMD's next-gen 10-core 'Medusa Point' APU shows up on Geekbench again, with its best score yet leaked SKU outpaces every other x86 mobile chip in the single-core test
summary: AMD's Medusa Point 10-core APU has achieved its best score yet on Geekbench, outperforming all other x86 mobile chips in the single-core test.
insight: AMD's Medusa Point APU surpasses all x86 mobile chips in single-core performance.

title: Zilog Z80 turns 50 as an open-source replacement heads to drop-in DIP40 silicon iconic 8-bit CPU launched in July 1976 and was discontinued in 2024
summary: The Zilog Z80 is a 50-year-old 8-bit CPU launched in 1976 with 8,500 transistors on a 4 micron process. It typically ran at 2.5 MHz and is still relevant due to its open-source replacement.
insight: Legacy of innovation endures through open-source CPU revival efforts.

title: Memory chip boss admits RAM prices are 'abnormally high' SK Group chairman considering building a semiconductor plant in the US to expand supply, calm chipflation
summary: SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won says memory chip prices are 'abnormally high'. To address this, he's considering building a semiconductor plant in the US to increase supply and calm 'chipflation'. This move aims to make the market more competitive.
insight: Industry must boost production to avoid new entrants and lower prices.

title: Phantom Twist drone spins so fast that it is nearly invisible flying device adds motion blur to the real world
summary: Researchers at Northwestern University built a drone that spins at high speeds, creating motion blur that makes it nearly invisible. This technology has potential applications in surveillance and stealth operations. The Phantom Twist drone uses rapid rotation to achieve this effect.
insight: Advancing stealth technology with motion-blurring speed and agility.

title: Samsung cuts hundreds of US consumer electronics jobs ahead of Texas HQ move 739 roles affected in New Jersey as chip division posts record profit
summary: Samsung cuts hundreds of US jobs in New Jersey, offering relocation to some.
insight: Mass layoffs signal significant restructuring amidst record profit growth

title: Russian drones spotted using screwed-on magnetic compasses as navigation aids the on-board camera can occasionally tilt down to check bearings if satellite comms are lost
summary: Russian drones use magnetic compasses as makeshift navigation aids, supplementing cameras.
insight: Russian drones adapt to satellite comms loss with simple, low-cost solutions.

title: Coil whine can be musical, demonstrates engineering student this usually hated noise can make some people happy
summary: A video showcases an engineering student turning coil whine into music, demonstrating that unwanted electronic noise can be repurposed as a pleasant sound. This transformation highlights the creative potential of noise pollution. The video showcases the student's ingenuity in turning a usually hated noise into something enjoyable.
insight: Creative repurposing of noise pollution can evoke positive emotions.

title: Globalscale Case8 A MediaTek Genio 520/720 cyberdeck for gaming, home automation, and education (Crowdfunding)
summary: Globalscale's Case8 cyberdeck offers a versatile, open-source platform for various use cases, powered by MediaTek Genio processors. It features multiple variants for gaming, home automation, education, and more. The platform offers a range of display and connectivity options.
insight: Redefining cyberdeck possibilities with modular, affordable, and accessible computing solutions.

title: Geniatech XPI-3576-CM5 A Raspberry Pi CM5-compatible Rockchip RK3576 AI Compute Module with WiFi 6, Bluetooth 5.3
summary: The Geniatech XPI-3576-CM5 is a Rockchip RK3576-based AI compute module compatible with Raspberry Pi CM5, featuring up to 16GB LPDDR5, 128GB eMMC, dual-band WiFi 6, and Bluetooth 5.3 connectivity.
insight: Enhanced AI capabilities with significant performance and power efficiency advancements.

title: IoTextra modular automation boards with 4 inputs, 4 outputs work with Raspberry Pi and ESP32 MCU boards
summary: IoTextra modular automation boards support various MCU platforms for automation needs, featuring 4 inputs and 4 outputs, and are compatible with Raspberry Pi and ESP32 boards.
insight: Modular automation boards with wide MCU compatibility simplify IoT development.

title: Efinix Titanium Edge FPGA family targets low-power edge AI and vision systems
summary: Efinix introduces the Titanium Edge FPGA family for low-power edge AI and vision systems, offering lower static power consumption, configurable I/O, and integrated memory.
insight: Lower power consumption enables AI and vision applications in resource-constrained edge environments

title: Beelink EQi 304 review Part 3: Ubuntu 26.04 on a Wildcat Lake mini PC
summary: The Beelink EQi 304 mini PC is tested with Ubuntu 26.04, featuring Intel Core 3 304 chip. The test covers various aspects such as benchmark results, networking, storage, and power consumption. The results provide insights into the mini PC's performance and capabilities.
insight: Ubuntu on Beelink EQi 304 offers alternative OS option with PCIe expansion

title: The quest for better chip design accelerates
summary: Synopsys has introduced Multiphysics Fusion products to reduce respins and costs. These products aim to accelerate chip design by addressing complex interactions between different physical domains. Early customers have already started adopting this technology.
insight: Streamlined chip design reduces respins and associated costs significantly.

title: Indie Gaming's Next Big Wave Is Coming From Outside the West
summary: Indie games from outside the West are gaining global recognition, reshaping the industry. Developers in Asia, Eastern Europe, and Oceania are leveraging local stories and fresh ideas to create hits. This diversity brings new perspectives and gameplay experiences.
insight: Global gaming market is becoming increasingly decentralized and culturally diverse.

title: FBI arrests 21-year-old accused of infecting 8,000 PCs with malware through fake Steam games
summary: The FBI arrested 21-year-old Zyaire Wilkins for infecting 8,000 PCs with malware through fake Steam games. The cybercrime operation, which lasted nearly two years, allegedly stole at least $220,000. Investigators believe the group had unnamed co-conspirators.
insight: Sophisticated cybercrime operations can target thousands with minimal effort and profit greatly

title: Nvidia may have RTX 5000 Super GPUs ready, but costly 3GB GDDR7 is holding them back
summary: Nvidia's RTX 5000 Super GPUs may be delayed due to expensive GDDR7 memory costs.
insight: GDDR7 memory costs threaten Nvidia's RTX 5000 Super release timeline.
